items.title: Dallas Mavericks Part 2: 2026 Mock Offseason | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Grant Afseth returns to the show to assist with the Mavericks mock offseason. We use some of the ideas discussed in part 1 to pursue trades that allow the Mavericks to accumulate draft assets while keeping the roster relatively competitive. You can follow Yossi on: Twitter:…

items.title: Resetting the Mavericks - 2026 Offseason Preview
items.body_excerpt: We are now one year removed from the Luka Doncic trade, and the worst appears to be behind us. The chain of events of the trade led the Mavericks to missing the playoffs and lucking into Cooper Flagg. He’s played exactly as advertised so far with one of the most outstanding…

items.title: NBA Game Notes (June 5, 2026)
items.body_excerpt: Three Stars Here are my “three stars” from yesterday’s NBA games, with the “first star” considered the top performer. First ⭐️ Karl-Anthony Towns scored a team-high 21 points as the New York Knicks edged out the San Antonio Spurs 105-104 to take a 2-0 lead in the NBA Finals.…
